title: Personal Portfolio Website
Description: An improved version of my personal portfolio website, showcasing projects and skills with a modern design with React Vite and TailWindCSS and templates from FlowBite and 21st Dev Community for most of the styling.

title: Class project - Recipe Application
Description: A recipe application built with React, Node.js, and deployment on Vercel.The application allows the user to search for recipes, view details, and save their favorite recipes.

title: Class project - Vehicle Management System
Description: Vehicle management system built with C# and .NET framework and data storage with JSON. The application allows users to manage their vehicles, including adding, editing, and deleting vehicle information.

title: Class Project - Pokemon Pocket Battles
Description: Pokemon card inspired game built using C#, .NET framework, JSON for data storage, and game engine Unity. The game allows players to battle against each other using their Pokemon card decks on a game board with different actions and effects.
